title: UX polish
notes: Loading indicators and smoother task list updates during HTMX requests
Sidebar backdrop, mobile full-width layout, and loading skeleton when editing
Sticky bulk bar with More actions dropdown; undo-aware delete messaging
Collapsible filter toolbar on mobile with active filter chips
Calendar sync link in Import/Export menu; profile clipboard toasts
Undo delete, ICS calendar feed, and import preview documented in About/README

title: Initial changelog
notes: Changelog entries are stored in config/changelog.json and served at /changelog
Optionally, changelog can be fetched from GitHub releases if GITHUB_REPO is set in .env
